programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof

programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.desc: When four seemingly unconnected women are murdered in their homes in Baton Rouge, LA, authorities go on the hunt for a serial killer. But when more murders happen 20 miles north, a small-town PD presents a theory contrary to the FBI’s.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: At the lot Tracey's extra nice style rubs the desperate owner of an impounded car the wrong way. Ticket writers Brian and Danielle take their football rivalry to the streets. Sherry and Garfield push their luck while booting cars downtown.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: A woman loses her cool at the impounded car lot after she lost the keys to her car.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: At the lot everyone helps an angry man keep his heartbeat steady; Carmen is pushed to the limit by an angry citizen; Jen becomes very energetic.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Police investigate an alleged theft at the impound lot. Rookie ticket writer Mike takes on South Street's drunken revelers. A wily man tries to escape Steve and Sherry's new high tech boot van.

programme.title: Intervention: Dorothy and Ivan
programme.desc: Neglected as a child by her alcoholic mother, Dorothy is now lost in a world of drugs, alcohol and self-inflicted cuts and burns. Ivan was once a rising rap star who got caught up in PCP addiction.

programme.title: Intervention: Andrew
programme.desc: Andrew once dreamed of a military career, but now binges and purges up to 12 times a day.

programme.title: Intervention: Diana
programme.desc: In three years, Diana's alcoholism has gotten so bad that it has led her to being diagnosed with Wernicke-Korsakoff Syndrome, an alcohol-related brain disorder, which recently landed her in the hospital with temporary paralysis and a feeding tube.

programme.title: Intervention: Julie
programme.desc: Julie spends her son's child support money on beer and 90-proof peppermint schnapps. She has a failing liver and constant blackouts.

programme.title: Intervention: Latisha
programme.desc: A mother of three, Latisha will go to any lengths to feed her crack addiction, including prostitution.

programme.title: Hoarders: Eileen/ Judy
programme.desc: Eileen has destroyed her 3,200 sq. ft. home, and her relationships with her husband and six sons. Judy has blown most of her $1 million inheritance on her hoard, and has lost $30,000 worth of checks in her hoarded house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Vula/ Lisa
programme.desc: Vula hoards more than 30 sickly cats that have completely destroyed her home. Lisa, a teacher, has already lost one job by bringing her hoard from home to the classroom.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prince and Me
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q dig deep into the past lives of strangers and then enlist volunteers to craft the perfect email. Tonight's loser ends up with an identity crisis.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The PB&J Episode
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Early Thanksgiving Episode
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Zero Donut Thirty
programme.desc: This episode includes a horrifying Halloween mask removal, a couple attacking a hornet's nest and an impossible task: getting the good donuts out of the conference room without being noticed.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Weekend Plans
programme.desc: Our three NSA interns watch a man blow up his own yard as two exotic dancers trash their locker room.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Down in the Dump
programme.desc: The guys lose sight of social etiquette with strangers in the park, present disastrous timeshare opportunities to future vacationers, and get sneaky with people’s pockets in the grocery store.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: Reunion Road Trip: With All of My Children
programme.desc: Some of the most beloved cast members of the iconic soap opera 'All My Children' reunite to celebrate its 50th anniversary and reminisce about the show’s origins, most outrageous storylines, and series cliff-hanger that left the fans wanting more.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The New Normal
programme.desc: Even though things are changing for the Kardashian family in ways they never expected, they are determined to remember that family always comes first.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Somewhere Over the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Kris starts dating someone after 25 years with Bruce, and no one is more critical than her daughters. Khloé ends up in hot water over a controversial Instagram post, and Kim gets a lesson in manners when she tries to recruit Kourtney for her video game.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Carfather
programme.desc: When Scott has a flurry of suspicious activity and vague business dealings, the family decides to pull back the curtain on Scott's man-of-mystery persona. Kris worries she's made a mistake with her living will; Kim stops Bruce from spending all his money.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Retreat
programme.desc: With Rob in crisis, the family intervenes, but when Rob refuses help, Kris is at her wit's end. Khloé leads a Dash teambuilding retreat, and Kim learns that getting pregnant again might not be in the cards.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: On the Road
programme.desc: When Khloé closes the book on her relationship with French Montana, Malika gets caught in the crossfire. Kris drags Kylie on a mother-daughter bonding trip to San Diego, and Kim speaks at a Silicon Valley tech conference.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Don't Panic!
programme.desc: Kris has had it with Scott when he brokers a Vegas nightclub appearance for her birthday, then shows up to it wasted and belligerent. Kim resorts to spy tactics to solve a theft problem at Dash New York. Kourtney poses for a nude pregnant photoshoot.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Special Delivery
programme.desc: A security breach motivates Kris to step up security. Scott goes to a Lord Disick party in Vegas while Kourtney finds out the baby could come early, and Kim and Khloé put together a last-minute baby shower.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Buggy Boo
programme.desc: The birth of child number three sends Scott spiraling, and Khloé enlists Bruce to help bring Scott back down to earth. Kylie's wish of owning a home comes true and Kim gets an unexpected treat when Kanye shoots a music video with North.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Reunion Road Trip: With All of My Children
programme.desc: Some of the most beloved cast members of the iconic soap opera 'All My Children' reunite to celebrate its 50th anniversary and reminisce about the show’s origins, most outrageous storylines, and series cliff-hanger that left the fans wanting more.

programme.title: Modern Family: Come Fly With Me
programme.desc: After some nudging, Jay begrudgingly takes Phil out to fly his new model airplane, but a manoeuvre goes awry. Meanwhile, when Gloria drops Manny off to play with Luke, she ends up volunteering to take Alex dress shopping.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fizbo
programme.desc: Phil and Claire decide to throw Luke the biggest and best birthday party, but when Cameron shows up as Fizbo the Clown, it sets off a chain of events that ends with someone in the hospital.

programme.title: Modern Family: Bixby's Back
programme.desc: To avoid becoming a boring couple, Phil and Claire revisit a role-playing rendezvous from the previous Valentine's Day. Meanwhile, Jay plans an elaborate surprise for Gloria, and an admirer comes between Cameron and Mitchell on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Modern Family: Princess Party
programme.desc: The guest list for Lily's princess-themed birthday party gets a little out of hand when Mitchell decides to invite his mom, much to Claire's dismay, and disinvite Fizbo, to Cameron's dismay.

programme.title: Modern Family: Door to Door
programme.desc: Jay is determined to help Manny sell wrapping paper for a school fundraiser. Claire petitions the city for a stop sign to be installed at a high-traffic intersection, and Mitchell is hell-bent on proving a point to Cameron.

programme.title: Modern Family: Lifetime Supply
programme.desc: When Phil misses the call from his doctor's office with his test results, he automatically jumps to conclusions and starts saying his goodbyes. Javier pops up unannounced again and takes Manny to the horse races for a belated birthday celebration.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Slight at the Opera
programme.desc: Cameron is putting on the school production of 'Phantom of the Opera,' but when their star falls ill, Manny pulls all the stops to land the lead, even if that means going against Luke.

programme.title: Modern Family: ClosetCon '13
programme.desc: With some urging from Claire, Jay begrudgingly agrees to return to ClosetCon this year, and things get interesting when Jay is reunited with some old colleagues.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Isle-Talian
programme.desc: Guy's diving into an island-Italian mashup. In Plymouth, Mass., a colourful joint dishes out a unique plantain sandwich and wings gone bananas. In Colorado Springs, a neighbourhood Italian spot serves up outrageous arancini and real-deal veal.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: One Street Wonders
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is heading to Cincinnati to try three righteous restaurants all on the same street. He checks out The Funky Pub where they're serving up all kinds of hot dogs and sammies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Finger Lickin' Food
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri is eating up grub that doesn't require a knife and fork! In Atlanta, a funky old house turned brew pub cookin' up cheddarwurst corn dogs along with a knockout pastrami sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Succulent Sandwiches
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into succulent sandwiches! In Oakland, a real-deal butchery stacking up killer cheesesteak and off-the-chain chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Brunch, Bologna and Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing everything from brunch to burgers! In Louisville, Ky., a breakfast-lunch spot crankin' out southern comfort, like lamb grits and fried bologna.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken Trifecta
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into some winner winner chicken dinners! In Maui, Hawaii, it's a star-studded stop at Mick Fleetwood's joint serving the rocker's mom's favourite chicken, plus a dish that musician Sammy Hagar dives right into.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Ocean Coasts and Great Lakes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from coast to coast and to the Great Lakes to dig up some dynamite dishes. In Los Angeles, a Mexican joint in Grand Central Market serves outrageous octopus tostadas and puts a lights-out spin on a burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Down-Home Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and digging into some down-home cooking. In Garland, Utah, a century-old staple servin' up savory sandwiches and a legendary sweet treat.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Old-School Selling

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: That's a Lotta Ciabatta
programme.desc: Chef Scott Conant and TV host Katie Brown bring in two masters of Italian pastamaking to see if Bobby Flay's skills can stand up to the test. Chefs Kerri Rogers and Joel Gargano want to make Bobby say addio with their buon cibo.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pump It Up
programme.desc: The laughs are flowing when comedian Tony Rock and jokester Alex Guarnaschelli heckle Bobby Flay in his own kitchen. Delaware chef Bill Clifton and Long Island's Stephan Bogardus compete for the last laugh.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Stuffed With Victory
programme.desc: Geoffrey Zakarian and TV host Sara Haines have a lot to be thankful for at the table this year, and they've brought in Creole Chef Bernard Carmouche and meatball master Daniel Sharp to stuff Bobby Flay like a turkey.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Monster Crabber
programme.desc: Deep in the woods and bayous of Louisiana, Wildlife Agents protect the state's resources. A crab fisherman is caught stealing dozens of traps, a hunter crosses state lines with an illegal deer, and Agents rescue an injured bald eagle.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Road Killer
programme.desc: In Jackson Parish, a reckless hunter is investigated for shooting down a highway. Meanwhile, Agents stake out a man suspected of two illegal deer kills, duck hunters are confronted for harassment and a crowded boat parade ends with citations.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Spy in the Sky
programme.desc: While using the LDWF's 'spy-in-the-sky' drone, Agents track down a boat captain breaking the law in Plaquemines Parish. A family of shrimpers is investigated for pulling oversized nets, and two feuding fishermen are suspected of being under the influence.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Blind Rage
programme.desc: As a storm rolls in over St. Tammany Parish, Cpl. Blaine Wagner and Cpl. Rick Clark assist in a search and rescue mission for a missing fisherman. Agents confront a repeat offender for harassing hunters and a felon is caught with an illegal firearm.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Deer in the Headlights
programme.desc: In Ouachita Parish, a trespassing investigation leads to a dicey encounter and multiple seizures of deer. Agents confront a group of duck hunters who are spotted killing non-game birds, and health code violations are found during a routine oyster patrol.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Mr. Bad Guy
programme.desc: In Southern Louisiana, Lt. David Nunez and Sgt. Austin Arteaga investigate a group of bird hunters on opening day of Teal Season. Later, a repeated offender is busted for taking immature crabs and a late-night deer decoy leads to a hunter in handcuffs.

programme.desc: Steve Irwin's family carry on his legacy as they run the Australian Zoo.

programme.desc: Kerry and Dave renovated and added to their home as their family grew, but their three kids have taken over every common room, leaving little to no space for the couple. Kerry would love a home with updated bathrooms and a dedicated space for the kids.

programme.desc: A mother of three boys wants to sell the house they've called home for eight years. She doesn't have her own bedroom and she's had enough. Her oldest hopes to change her mind as he loves the large property and his mom's short drive to work.

programme.title: Ghosts of Morgan City: Ghost Girl

programme.title: Ghosts of Morgan City: Blue Shirt of Idlewild
programme.desc: The team investigates a limbless phantom at a historic plantation in Patterson, Louisiana. They soon face more spirits than they bargained for after discovering a connection to voodoo and the deadly yellow fever epidemic.

programme.title: Ghosts of Morgan City: Pirate Island
programme.desc: A call from the Morgan City police sends the team to Louisiana's Atchafalaya Basin, where a trapper reports seeing two men vanish into thin air. A contestant from Naked and Afraid reveals evidence of a dangerous pirate's spirit.

programme.title: Ghosts of Morgan City: Irish Bend Soldier

programme.title: Ghosts of Morgan City: Berwick Bloody Four

programme.title: Ghosts of Morgan City: Haunted Headquarters

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: The Will to Kill
programme.desc: A retired farmer thinks he's struck gold after natural gas is found on his property. When he’s found dead and a family feud breaks out over his estate, detectives uncover a tale of lies, deceit and manipulation orchestrated by someone close to home.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: The Devil in Delaware
programme.desc: A quiet town is rocked to its core when a brutalized corpse of a single father is discovered by the side of a residential road. Detectives are led down an unexpected path of betrayal, lies, manipulation and murder amongst friends.

programme.desc: A first time inmate says he must turn to violence to avoid becoming a victim, an accused rapist gets into more trouble in jail, and what he does next has some questioning his motives. And one female inmate attacks another during church services.

programme.title: Dateline: Silent Witness
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in a field in the outskirts of Green Bay, Wisconsin and a Fitbit helps detectives solve the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: The Halloween Party
programme.desc: After a young woman goes missing from a Halloween party, a town turns out to search while detectives settle in for a long investigation.

programme.title: Dateline: The Halloween Party
programme.desc: After a young woman goes missing from a Halloween party, a town turns out to search while detectives settle in for a long investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: Deception
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team are called in on a weekend when a Navy lieutenant-commander in charge of a shipment of nuclear weapons is apparently abducted. The team works to piece together his location by tracking a distress call she made from her cellphone.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Little Angels
programme.desc: Videotape revealing a Naval Commander's daughter being buried alive strikes a nerve with Special Agent Sam Hanna, and thrusts the NCIS team into a race against time to save the girl before time runs out.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Standoff
programme.desc: After a downtown Navy Recruitment Centre is held hostage, Callen mediates with his ex-partner, Tracy Keller, to uncover information about a hijacked shipment of Spike missiles.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Anonymous
programme.desc: After a state department employee and a plastic surgeon are murdered by a group of terrorists, the NCIS team must frantically search for the only witness who can identify the killers' surgically altered faces.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Bounty
programme.desc: When a former Army Sergeant responsible for hunting down high-value targets is found dead, the NCIS team searches for terrorist leaders suspected of his murder.

programme.title: NCIS: Light Sleeper
programme.desc: When the wives of two marines are murdered, Gibbs and the team are called in to investigate. Gibbs and the team fear the murders are racially motivated, and they work together to find the killer and protect the woman they fear is the next target.

programme.title: NCIS: Head Case
programme.desc: The NCIS team makes a gruesome discovery, the severed head of a marine, when they bust a stolen car ring run by marines. The team looks for clues that will lead them to the rest of the marine's body and the person responsible for the crime.

programme.title: NCIS: Family Secret
programme.desc: The team investigates the mysterious explosion of an ambulance that is supposedly carrying the remains of a marine killed in a car crash. They soon discover that the DNA of the victim does not match that of the soldier.

programme.title: NCIS: Ravenous
programme.desc: Teens on a nature hike discover marine dog tags in a national forest. As the team investigates, they discover that past accidents in the park seem to be linked to a possible serial killer who is using the park as a location to torture and kill women.

programme.title: NCIS: Bait
programme.desc: A student at Quantico base high school attaches a bomb to his body and holds his fellow students hostage. With snipers poised to take the teen down, Gibbs realizes that the 17-year-old might not be acting on his own.

programme.title: NCIS: Iced
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team are called in when a couple of kids stumble upon the body of a missing marine in a frozen lake. As the team searches the lake for clues, they come across three more bullet-ridden bodies.

programme.title: Family Guy: Married With Cancer
programme.desc: Brian meets and quickly falls in love with a woman named Jess, who reveals she has cancer. After she receives devastating news regarding her diagnosis, Brian proposes marriage to her.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dead Dog Walking
programme.desc: Brian's marriage to Jess is not what he envisioned, especially after her miraculous recovery from cancer. At the suggestion of Peter, Brian lets himself go, causing Jess to make a surprising decision.

programme.title: Family Guy: Pal Stewie

programme.title: Family Guy: Big Trouble in Little Quahog

programme.title: Family Guy: The Griffin Winter Games

programme.title: Family Guy: Trump Guy
programme.desc: The Griffins move to Washington D.C. where Peter is hired as the new White House Press Secretary.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fool Monty

programme.title: The Simpsons: How Munched Is That Birdie in the Window?

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: All That Gene

programme.title: Archer: Pipeline Fever

programme.title: Archer: The Double Deuce
programme.desc: When members of Woodhouse's famed WWI Royal Flying Corps squadron start dying mysteriously, he naturally suspects foul play. As does Archer, who tries to help his loyal manservant track down the killer.

programme.desc: Tired of his colleagues constantly calling him a failure, Cyril agrees to help George Spelvin, a mysterious computer security expert, inject a virus into the ISIS mainframe so Cyril can defeat the virus and be seen as a hero.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Cult Kings

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Legend of the Knights Templar
programme.desc: The holy order of the Knights Templar are believed to have located and seized the Ark of the Covenant centuries ago.

programme.desc: The discovery of strange giant stone heads in the Mexican jungle leads archaeologists to the lost capital city of the Olmec, and new investigations reveal evidence that the secret knowledge of these mysterious people changed life in the Americas forever.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Desert
programme.desc: The ancient city of Petra, a city carved from desert rock, has baffled experts for decades. Now, new technologies resurrect the city and reveal why the spectacular civilization was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dark Secrets of the Pyramid
programme.desc: New evidence could help solve some of the Great Pyramid's greatest mysteries. Follow the investigation into how it was built, revealing the truth behind its hidden tombs and deepest secrets.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Antarctic Trail of Doom
programme.desc: The Scott Antarctic Expedition aspired to conquer the South Pole before anyone else, but this great endeavor of exploration never returned; now, newly uncovered evidence suggests this team may have succumbed to something more sinister than harsh elements.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Yellowstone Supervolcano
programme.desc: Beneath Yellowstone National Park is one of the world's largest active volcanos, and it's poised to erupt at any moment; experts use seismic technology and visual imaging to reveal its catastrophic threat.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Finding Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Amelia Earhart's disappearance is one of America's greatest unsolved mysteries, but now, forensic science might finally crack the case, as experts examine human remains that could be proof positive of her whereabouts.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Secrets of the Scorpion
programme.desc: A nuclear submarine spying on Soviet maneuvers goes missing and its wreckage is mysteriously found on the ocean floor. The US Navy claims it was an accident, but declassified documents reveal startling new information that points to a Cold War cover up.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Secrets of the Sonic Weapon
programme.desc: American diplomats stationed in Cuba begin to experience a bizarre mixture of noxious neurological symptoms and seem to be under a mysterious attack; experts use cutting-edge forensic science to determine if a sinister, sonic weapon is at play.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Buried Beneath Jerusalem
programme.desc: Lost for centuries, scholars believe the Ark of the Covenant never left Jerusalem and remains buried beneath this ancient city. Now, a pioneering team of archaeologists is on a quest to unearth the most famous and treasured artifact in human history.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Heist in the Holy Land
programme.desc: Ancient documents and legends suggest that the Ark of the Covenant may have been stolen by Roman legions and hidden in Rome. Now, a team of archaeologists explore mystery cults and ancient catacombs to uncover the truth behind this treasured artifact.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: The Jeremiah Code
programme.desc: According to biblical scripture, the prophet Jeremiah hid the Ark of the Covenant at a remote location for safekeeping. Now, a team of archaeologists investigate sacred sites and ancient tombs to retrace the possible journey of this lost artifact.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: Legend of the Knights Templar
programme.desc: The holy order of the Knights Templar are believed to have located and seized the Ark of the Covenant centuries ago.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Shattered: The Green Light
programme.desc: In 1991, a single mother takes her daughter to a busy electronics store to buy a boom box. Nearly nine hours later, she walks out as a battered survivor of one of the largest hostage crises in U.S. history.

programme.title: Shattered: Butcher on Mincey Road
programme.desc: When a woman's marriage takes a violent turn, her daughter seeks refuge at the nearby home of a caring neighbor. She has no idea, however, that the place she considers a safe haven is not at all what it seems.

programme.title: Shattered: No Good Deed
programme.desc: In 2009, one woman's long and painful struggle to overcome addiction and help others ends in a way no one ever saw coming.

programme.title: American Monster: Ghost From the Past
programme.desc: Best friends Julie Marange and Kristin Dargis are like sisters. So, when Julie falls for Kristin's brother, George, it seems to be the perfect romance. But both soon realize that escaping the past takes more than love - and can lead to fatal consequences.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Where Is Jennifer Kesse?
programme.desc: A young woman vanishes from her Florida condo – security footage captures a phantom figure calmly parking her car.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Diary of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A college student disappears at the start of his freshman year without a trace, leaving his family and his girlfriend reeling. When authorities look to his best friend for answers, they uncover a love triangle gone wrong.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Have a Surprise for You
programme.desc: A woman arrives at her parents' house to find them bleeding on the floor. Her 16-year-old brother claims that their dad shot their mother and then himself. But investigators quickly uncover the shocking truth as they confront a cunning teenage psychopath.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Jewel Stolen
programme.desc: When a young mother is found murdered in her own home, investigators must untangle a web of lies using wiretaps and secret recordings to ultimately pick up the trail of her cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Where Is Jennifer Kesse?
programme.desc: A young woman vanishes from her Florida condo – security footage captures a phantom figure calmly parking her car.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Diary of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A college student disappears at the start of his freshman year without a trace, leaving his family and his girlfriend reeling. When authorities look to his best friend for answers, they uncover a love triangle gone wrong.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Have a Surprise for You
programme.desc: A woman arrives at her parents' house to find them bleeding on the floor. Her 16-year-old brother claims that their dad shot their mother and then himself. But investigators quickly uncover the shocking truth as they confront a cunning teenage psychopath.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In Defiance of Evil
programme.desc: A teenager vanishes during a bike ride through Defiance Park. The investigation into her disappearance leads police to fear that a serial killer is on the loose in Tacoma.

programme.title: American Monster: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Mark Corona and Paul Stoeppler are two cousins who are as close as brothers. This blood bond is destroyed when one of them is murdered in cold blood. Never-before-seen home video and shocking CCTV footage reveal what really happened.

programme.title: Disappeared: About a Boy
programme.desc: Eight year old Zachary Bernhardt disappears from his Florida home late at night. Suspicions swirl around his mom, but she denies any involvement and moves away. When another boy goes missing, new theories emerge.

programme.title: Disappeared: On a Mission
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman moves to the United States for a new opportunity, but in a mere matter of weeks, she vanishes without a trace. Kidnapping survivor, Elizabeth Smart, joins in the search to find her in this mystery where the clues are sparse.

programme.title: True Crime With Aphrodite Jones: Burning Man
programme.desc: The charred remains of an unidentified man are discovered in Florida.

programme.title: Truth About Murder With Sunny Hostin: Terrible Place to Die
programme.desc: A stranger brutally attacks two young women in a park in Portland, Texas. One victim is killed, while the other, miraculously survives. With the help of the survivor, investigators desperately hunt for the killer before he can strike again.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Hero or Killer?
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio in 1991, 15-year-old David Clark was convicted of setting a house on fire that killed a 12-year-old girl. Now, two of his sisters have called Chris and Fatima in to investigate and help them prove this was a wrongful conviction.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Hero Betrayed
programme.desc: When a hero firefighter is found savagely murdered in his own home, the trail of evidence police find takes them on a twisting and tension filled journey to justice.

programme.title: True Conviction: Protecting a Friend
programme.desc: Young mother Tyshika Askins is found dead in her home but after charging the wrong man, police knew the key to solving the case lies is an OJ container left out on a kitchen counter.

programme.title: Homicide City: High Rise Murder
programme.desc: When Helen Bernstein is found dead in the bathtub of her Chestnut Hill high-rise, she appears to have died of natural causes.

programme.title: Dateline: The Informant
programme.desc: A young woman’s chilling story about a girl’s abduction and murder helps re-open a case that has haunted a New York town for decades.

programme.title: Diabolical: Til' Death Do We Part
programme.desc: Lyle and Carol Kopenskey are high school sweethearts who marry after graduation. The couple that other couples want to be like. But after 40 years of marital bliss, an old friend returns to the fold and jealousies turn passions into cold blooded murder.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: What My Mother Knew
programme.desc: Every week Janine Sutphen went to symphony practice. One night, she didn't come home. Her husband reveals to police there's more to this housewife than anyone knew. But very quickly a secret comes out- leading investigators down a dark, twisted path.

programme.title: If I Should Die: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Fifteen-year-old Candice Parchment goes missing from her Georgia home and is found murdered months later. The investigation hits a dead end until the discovery of Candice's diary reveals a shocking assault and points to the person who killed her.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Killer Collection
programme.desc: Gary and Jan Tyrrell are a beloved couple living in a quaint suburb of Springfield, Missouri. The tight-knit community is soon rocked by their double homicide, with friends and neighbours looking at those closest to the pair as their potential killer.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Combat Tech: ROVs
programme.desc: Go inside the robotic warriors and unmanned war machines that are taking their place on the front lines and spearheading a revolution on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Bombers
programme.desc: Go inside the most dominant and lethal military aircraft, from the bombers that won the War to the B-52, from the stealth B-2 to the most advanced and top secret bombers of the future.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Armor
programme.desc: An in-depth, action-packed look at the most advanced armor technologies, from body armor to heavy duty composites that make the Abrams tank the best protected and the most lethal vehicle on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Whitey Bulger: Final Takedown
programme.desc: In 1995 ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: El Chapo: Caught!
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera aka El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the US marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: Although the falling of Baghdad took only 21 days, the capture of Saddam Hussein took eight more months. Learn firsthand how the United Sates Army investigators tracked every lead until their final raid uncovered the Iraqi dictator in his spider hole.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Montana Barn Battle
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders square off against their toughest barn yet- a stubborn old timber frame with wooden pegs, metal spikes, steel bolts and a whole lot of beams. But saving this barn is worth the effort because it will be rebuilt for a veterans group.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Bank Barn Brawl
programme.desc: The builders head back to Brookville, Pennsylvania, to save the frame of a bank barn that sits dangerously close to a road. Then, Mark visits an old log lodge resort and scouts an amazing timber frame barn built in 1895.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: American Muscle
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders create a timber frame barn for a private collection of American muscle cars in Columbus, Texas. Mark visits one of the biggest barns he's ever seen, finds the oldest live oak tree in the state and explores some local history.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Cabin at a Crossroads
programme.desc: Mark finds a cabin from a unique moment in history when pioneers started using new technology: the sawmill. Later, Mark visits another West Virginia cabin filled with family memories.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders help making a fishing cabin for a family.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Battle-Ready

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Good Neighbors
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a dangerous barn for their new neighbours and build a replica of Abraham Lincoln's boyhood cabin. Graham learns to make bentwood furniture, and the teams visit a stunning opera house.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Lackluster Fixer Changes to Contemporary Charm for Young Family
programme.desc: Luke and Rachel Whyte are a young couple with a baby girl, and they feel it's time to settle into a family-sized house. They're looking for a house with 3 to 4 bedrooms, and Rachel is hoping for a space that she can make into a playroom/home office.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: School Spirit Spurs Home Search
programme.desc: Baylor alumni look for homecoming house near campus.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Baby's Due Date Causes Rush to Renovate an Outdated Ranch
programme.desc: New parents' new arrival determines deadline for Chip and Jo's finished fixer.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Client Rebuilds Life With Renovated Home
programme.desc: Chip and Jo's client, Carolyn, is rebuilding her life after losing her home and her husband. The Gaines show Carolyn three fixer uppers in her hometown of West, Texas, a tight-knit community still recovering from a devastating fertilizer plant explosion.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Nomadic Suburbanites Seek Unique Retro Residence
programme.desc: The Ivy family is looking for their final home after moving eight times. Chip and Jo take them on a tour of three completely different homes that all pose different renovation challenges and feel the pressure as they transform an outdated home.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Top 10 Family Retreats
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters share the Top 10 family retreats as voted on by the fans.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Most Challenging Builds
programme.desc: This week the Cabin Masters take a look back and count down the top ten Most Challenging Builds.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line
programme.desc: Chase and the team are hired to finish a cabin for a homeowner that's been collecting materials for years but just hasn't been able to finish the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Retro-fit for the Whole Family
programme.desc: A couple found their own slice of heaven overlooking Lake Annabessacook, only to find out it needed more work than they could provide.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ozark Mountains
programme.desc: Casey travels over the Ozarks to tackle the Goliath, a massive cupcake equal to 22 regular-sized cupcakes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets a lesson in the meat that makes Texas famous, sampling the Texas chili burger and the big Texas barbecue baked potato. Then he tries a local legend's tamale recipe before rounding off the day with strawberry waffle bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Funnel Cakes and Fried Fudge
programme.desc: The York Fair in Pennsylvania has been drawing crowds since 1765, and has had 250 years to perfect its carnival eats! Noah decks the halls with a taste of Christmas, goes off on the burger bomb pretzel, and enjoys a fork free chick 'n' waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Everything's Bigger and Better in Texas
programme.desc: Discover a Forth Worth Tex Mex Burrito almost as big as the state of Texas itself.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bacon 2: The Sequel
programme.desc: Bacon is the star of its own blockbuster sequel and host Noah Cappe is at the front of line to savor even more bacon-tastic fairground favs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Postman Always Brings Rice
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe heads to Hawaii for the Maui Fair where rice is always on the menu. He enjoys traditional Hawaiian treats like the Laulau Feast and Loco Moco and cross-cultural favs like Furikake Salmon.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Dates
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is ready for 1,001 nights of fun at the Arabian Nights-themed Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival in Indio, Calif. He makes a date with a dangerous burger and enjoys a sweet mashup with the churro dog.

programme.title: Snackmasters: Domino's Pepperoni Passion
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix sets two fine-dining chefs the challenge of replicating the legendary Domino's Pepperoni Passion pizza. Rival chefs Jason Atherton and Francesco Mazzei go to outlandish extremes to cook their pizzas for a panel of Domino's bosses.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Best Meal Deal
programme.desc: You don't have to sacrifice incredible food experiences in order to save a buck. Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif., Duff Goldman saves a ton as he takes on the enormous Orca Platter.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Miracles on the Plains
programme.desc: Look back at the 2013 Auburn football season and their remarkable turnaround from the lowest of lows to a national championship game.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Book of Manning
programme.desc: Written into the pages of football folklore is the Manning legend, a story started by patriarch, Archie, with chapters featuring his sons, Cooper, Peyton and Eli. Director Rory Karpf explores how a tragedy shaped the course of their lives.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Believer
programme.desc: This profile of Steve Spurrier looks at his close ties to the SEC as a young fan, a Heisman Trophy winning quarterback and an accomplished coach.

programme.title: SEC Storied: It's Time
programme.desc: On October 28, 1989, defensive back Chucky Mullins hit running back Brad Gaines and, in the process, broke his own neck. Look at the friendship between these players after Mullins was left as a quadriplegic following the tragic incident.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Bo You Don't Know
programme.desc: Robert 'Bo' Rein was a baseball and football star at Ohio State before beginning a football coaching career at just 30 years old. in 1979 he was hired to coach the LSU Tigers before tragedy struck and left everyone thinking about what might have been.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Sweat Solution
programme.desc: The film explores the inception of Gatorade set against the 1965 and 1966 seasons of the Florida Gators football team. Originally produced for the 50th anniversary, the film revisits the stories of those involved in testing the original formula.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Don't Let's Start

programme.title: The Closer: Slippin'
programme.desc: Deputy Chief Brenda Johnson investigates the shooting of three youngsters. The shooting has all the marks of a gang related crime. Meanwhile Brenda must deal with her mother.

programme.title: The Closer: Aftertaste
programme.desc: A young woman at a high-priced restaurant is murdered; Brenda turns 40.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Do Not Disturb
programme.desc: A foreigner is found murdered inside his hotel room. The squad must work quickly to find the killer while avoiding any international repercussions when a U.S. diplomat becomes involved in the case.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Jane Doe #38
programme.desc: After finding a young runaway murdered and thrown in a trash can, the Major Crimes unit is led on a long, puzzling hunt to find the deceased girl's killer and her identity. Meanwhile, Ryador consults her husband about a proposition she has for Rusty.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Two Options
programme.desc: The shooting deaths of an elderly couple in their home prompts the team to join forces with the Special Operations Bureau to track down a deadly predator prowling Los Angeles and taking prisoners along the way.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Cutting Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Mike Tao of Major Crimes finds himself doing double duty when the star of the cop show on which he moonlights as a consultant becomes the prime suspect in the murder of his biggest fan.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sweet Revenge
programme.desc: The mysterious murder of a tech-entrepreneur with questionable morals and possible mob connections has the division working overtime. Meanwhile, Rusty struggles to feel accepted when Raydor's son Ricky comes to visit.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Sugar Daddy Death
programme.desc: A married Google executive is found dead on his luxury yacht, those close to him are left baffled when the autopsy results are released. The only clue into Forrest Hayes’ death is a sexy woman seen on the boat’s surveillance.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Killer Affair
programme.desc: Days after a pregnant elementary school teacher disappears, her boyfriend goes in front of TV cameras and tearfully pleads for her return. But investigators soon discover the grieving boyfriend may have had more than one reason to cry.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Southern Harm
programme.desc: When four seemingly unconnected women are murdered in their homes in Baton Rouge, LA, authorities go on the hunt for a serial killer. But when more murders happen 20 miles north, a small-town PD presents a theory contrary to the FBI’s.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Big Easy Black Widow
programme.desc: In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, resources are depleted. When a Pastor turns up dead outside of his New Orleans apartment, his case, along with countless others, goes cold, until his wife's next husband turns up dead as well.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Modern Family: Las Vegas
programme.desc: The adults are Vegas-bound when Jay hooks them up with Excelsior Level hotel accommodations courtesy of one of his big clients, but after learning there's an even higher level, Jay becomes obsessed with upgrading.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: After a long reunion weekend with Phil's old cheer buddies, Claire jumps at the chance to snag the only first-class seat left on the return flight home, leaving Phil in coach. Both have completely opposite experiences to what they were expecting.

programme.title: Modern Family: Integrity
programme.desc: Phil and Jay run an errand together to pick up Lily's hand-me-down princess castle for Joe. However, both are in a mood because Phil is upset that Claire won't let him buy a video game console and Jay thinks Gloria is letting Joe play with girlie items.

programme.title: Modern Family: Clean Out Your Junk Drawer
programme.desc: Gloria wins a bid at the school auction for a family seminar with famed doctor and author Debra Radcliffe, whose self-help book 'Clean Out Your Junk Drawer' encourages people to get rid of all their emotional junk to become healthier people.

programme.title: Modern Family: Thunk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Jay lets his jealousy get the best of him when a life-size cutout of Gloria for her grocery store hot sauce display solicits all kinds of unsavoury attention from men. He enlists Manny as his accomplice in a poorly orchestrated heist.

programme.title: Modern Family: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Claire has somehow turned into super mom, running Jay's closet business and yet still has time for all the duties at home. The kids could not be happier, but Phil could not be more frustrated.

programme.title: Modern Family: Pig Moon Rising
programme.desc: During a quick workout session in the garage, Mitchell accidentally knocks over an urn filled with the ashes of Cam's beloved pet pig Lilly. He quickly attempts to cover up his blunder and devises an appropriate cover-up.

programme.title: Modern Family: He Said, She Shed
programme.desc: Claire's request to build a 'She Shed' in their backyard is denied by the homeowner's association and only Luke and Phil know the real reason why.

programme.title: Modern Family: Mother!
programme.desc: When Dede drops in unexpectedly, Mitchell and Cam come to a realization about her effect on their lives; Phil, Luke, Alex and Haley all have different bad news to break to Claire and compete about when to do it.

programme.title: Modern Family: Torn Between Two Lovers
programme.desc: Haley can't seem to choose between her past and present relationships and is forced to decide. Meanwhile, Manny returns to college and dorm life while his girlfriend, Sherry, continues to stay at Jay and Gloria's.

programme.title: Modern Family: Whanex?
programme.desc: While preparing a presentation for his students about their future goals, Cam must also contend with a bully at the school and Jay is having a little technical trouble during his video conference.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wild
programme.desc: Mitch, Cam and Phil crash Jay's annual hiking trip to find an elusive bald eagle after Gloria asks them to keep an eye on him. Meanwhile, Gloria, Alex, Claire and Haley get together to plan her baby shower.

programme.title: Modern Family: Can't Elope
programme.desc: Haley and Dylan's plan to quietly elope before the babies are born doesn't go as smoothly as they had hoped. Meanwhile, Jay continues to try and get his new business off the ground by courting an Instagram celebrity.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Cover Girl
programme.desc: Samantha offers to help Carrie with her book cover; Charlotte shops on-line.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Plus One Is the Loneliest Number
programme.desc: Samantha organizes Carrie's book-launch party; Miranda doesn't tell her date about Brady.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Carrie obsesses over a comment made about Aidan; Samantha baby-sits Brady.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Big Journey
programme.desc: Hoping to see Big, Carrie travels to a book reading in San Francisco with Samantha.

programme.title: Sex and the City: I Love a Charade
programme.desc: The girls head to the Hamptons for the memorable wedding of a supposedly gay singer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: To Market, to Market
programme.desc: Carrie calms her nerves over a first date with a fellow author by going on another date.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Great Sexpectations
programme.desc: Carrie is disappointed by Jack's lacklustre performance between the sheets.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Perfect Present
programme.desc: Carrie spends a sleepless night at Berger's apartment; Samantha meets her waiter again.

programme.title: Botched: Dr. Nassif Saved My Life
programme.desc: After saving Luci's life, Paul is given the go-ahead to finally fix her nose. Terry repairs a DJ's oversized hest and the doctors meet a woman with anxiety issues and help her find a solution for her terrible Tijuana procedures.

programme.title: Botched: Boner-free Zone
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow transforms a woman's 'boner-free zone.' Dr. Nassif fixes the nose of a woman who had her dentist perform her rhinoplasty, and the doctors meet a mother who had extensive plastic surgery to look exactly like her daughter.

programme.title: Botched: Breast Greedy
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif performs a rhinoplasty on a woman who had her first nose job at 12 years old. Dr. Dubrow works on a patient who wants to retire her Baywatch boobs and the doctors are left speechless by a patient who can only be described as 'unique.'

programme.title: Botched: The Wizard of Schnoz
programme.desc: Terry makes a breast cancer survivor feel whole again while Paul operates on two sisters' twin beaks, affirming that he is the true Wizard of Schnoz. Terry gets a visit from his favorite patient...his wife, Heather.

programme.title: Botched: Where the Wildd Things Are
programme.desc: The doctors help the self-proclaimed 'most unlucky person in the world.' Lacey Wildd is back with a problem bigger than her boobs. A transgender showgirl seeks the Doctors help to become her favorite cartoon character.

programme.title: Botched: The Living Doll
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow operates on a transgender woman's uni-boob, Dr. Nassif fixes a 24-year-old crater on a woman's nose and the Doctors meet Blondie who aspires to be a plastic doll.

programme.title: Botched: Stitched Up Sisters
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow keeps it all in the family when he performs full body work on a pair of co-dependent sisters. Dr. Nassif operates on a large man with an even larger nose and the doctors meet Youtuber and extreme waist trainer Penny Brown.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Patriarch of Perfection
programme.desc: Meet the Chrisley family, where Todd Chrisley is king. He micromanages his family just like his business and always tries to stay five steps ahead of his five children.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Not So Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Savannah is turning sweet 16, and a big birthday bash is in the works. Todd has to come to grips with the fact that his little girl is growing into a young woman. At the party, Todd keeps a watchful eye on girl-crazy Chase.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Jugs and Ammo
programme.desc: Todd’s eldest daughter Lindsie broke his heart when she eloped with her now-husband, Will, without telling her family. While Lindsie recovers from plastic surgery, Todd and Will make an effort to find some common ground at the shooting range.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Two Men and a Baby
programme.desc: The Chrisleys welcome a new addition to the family: Baby Chloe. Chloe is Kyle's daughter, and she is coming to live with Todd and Julie while they teach Kyle 'Parenting 101.' Savannah and Chase get into a fender bender in Savannah's new car.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd-Tervention
programme.desc: The Chrisley's are off to their South Carolina lake house in celebration of Todd's mother, Faye's, birthday. To his kids' dismay, Todd confiscates all electronic devices to ensure a weekend of real family bonding.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Big Apple Blowup
programme.desc: Todd takes Savannah and Chase to New York City to teach them about the family fashion business. Savannah proves to be a perfect student, but the only thing Chase learns is how to pick up models.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Date Night
programme.desc: The Chrisley kids show their love for their parents by treating them to a special day of pampering and a romantic dinner, but planning isn't the kids' strong suit. What starts off with good intentions ends up in a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hey Chloe, It's Your Birthday!
programme.desc: Todd bets Julie he can throw just as fabulous a birthday party for Chloe as she could. The bet is on, but Todd has to do it all on his own. He soon realizes that planning cupcakes and a petting zoo is not as easy as Julie makes it look.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon: Backyard BBQ
programme.desc: Bobby Flay and Michael Symon suss out the talents of eight elite barbecue masters, but before choosing teams, they face off in a backyard barbecue challenge to determine who gets first pick.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon: High Steaks
programme.desc: Bobby Flay and Michael Symon battle it out in a tomahawk rib-eye challenge with high 'steaks', as the winner gets an advantage that could affect the entire competition.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon: Winging It
programme.desc: In their biggest competition yet, Bobby Flay and Michael Symon try to best each other in a regional barbecue challenge with a major advantage. The final four pitmasters are tasked with cooking a style of barbecue unique to an area of the country.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon: Going Whole Hog
programme.desc: The competition started with eight of the world's greatest barbecue pitmasters, and it's down to the final two. Bobby Flay and Michael Symon transform from mentors to sous chefs in a barbecue battle for the ages.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: Introduce Your 'Cue
programme.desc: A new crop of barbecue pitmasters step onto the scene and introduce themselves through their food. Captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson choose their teams and get ready for their first no-limits team battle.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Grill Fits the Bill
programme.desc: Food Network's Marc Murphy and Chef Anne Burrell want to rake Bobby Flay over the coals. They'll have help from two grill masters, Chef David Bancroft and BBQ champion Susie Bulloch, as they show no chill trying to grill Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Flame-tastic
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's good friends Michael Symon and Alex Guarnaschelli are back in the arena and looking to fire up a win. Armando Litiatco and Mikala Brennan battle for a chance to smoke Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Open Grill Season
programme.desc: Top Chef host Gail Simmons and The Kitchen's Sunny Anderson are striking while the iron is hot in tonight's battle! Here to tame the flame are Brooklyn's own Brandon Byrd and top Floridian chef Nicolay Adinaguev.
