programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Lethal Lover
programme.desc: When police respond to a harrowing 9-1-1 call from a man pleading for his life, they are led on the trail of a revenge plot more disturbing than the young victim’s worst nightmare.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Royalty, Romance, and Revenge
programme.desc: Jane Andrews appears to be living the dream life with her high society beau, Tom Cressman, until he’s found stabbed to death in their home.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Secret Lives and Alibis
programme.desc: When Ann Huxley learns that her ex-husband has been found dead in the warehouse where he works, a deadly get-rich-quick scheme begins to unravel.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: When Rhoni Reuter, the pregnant girlfriend of Chicago Bears legend Shaun Gayle, is shot to death in her home, investigators are faced with a long list of romantic rivals as suspects.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Fatal Love Triangle
programme.desc: A teen rivalry turns deadly when Rachel Wade and Sarah Ludemann both fall in love with charismatic bad boy Josh Camacho.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: On the surface, Shannon and Eddie Baugus seemed to have the perfect marriage until a deadly confrontation exposed a dark history of domestic abuse.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Restricted Zone
programme.desc: Johnathan and Sig partner to hunt the elusive Bairdi hoard at the edge of the Restricted Zone. Jake earns an unexpected windfall of King Crab quota, but extended fishing and mechanical failures put safety at risk just as the Coast Guard boards the Saga.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: What Would Phil Harris Do?
programme.desc: With the Bairdi fishery open for the first time in years, Josh and John on the Time Bandit reopen the Phil Harris playbook and ask Casey and Sig to help tank the fleetwide quota. Wild Bill bets on Nick McGlashan to turn the tide for the Summer Bay.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Tangled Web
programme.desc: With bonus scenes and added features: Word spreads about an emergency shutdown at the Bairdi fishery, causing Sig to rally his fellow captains with a unique new plan.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dedication
programme.desc: In the Winter premiere, the fleet reels from the loss of Summer Bay deck boss Nick McGlashan. Wizard and Cornelia launch early into a massive Arctic storm. Johnathan can't see eye-to-eye with an old friend and shocking news forces Sig to change his plans.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: All-Nighter
programme.desc: Inspired by Phil's love of history, Josh, Casey and Johnathan Hillstrand brave unknown waters in the dead of night to try their hand at the ancient Hawaiian Ika-Shibi fishing technique.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dedication
programme.desc: In the Winter premiere, the fleet reels from the loss of Summer Bay deck boss Nick McGlashan. Wizard and Cornelia launch early into a massive Arctic storm. Johnathan can't see eye-to-eye with an old friend and shocking news forces Sig to change his plans.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: All-Nighter
programme.desc: Inspired by Phil's love of history, Josh, Casey and Johnathan Hillstrand brave unknown waters in the dead of night to try their hand at the ancient Hawaiian Ika-Shibi fishing technique.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Giants of the North
programme.desc: See how tourists explore the far reaches of northern Canada and gain exclusive access to polar bears on custom-built rovers, and how the Twin Otter aircraft drops much needed supplies to isolated villages.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Arctic's Toughest
programme.desc: The world's only actual all-terrain vehicle is an Arctic mega monster that can conquer land, snow, and water in dangerous conditions; elsewhere in avalanche country, only one machine can climb deadly mountains and protect a major highway.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Monster of the Arctic
programme.desc: When melting ice threatens to flood a town, a 22-ton amphibious mega machine battles the elements to save the day; in the Arctic, the Canadian Air Force relies on a massive transport aircraft to deliver supplies and personnel to far-off places.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Subzero Special Ops
programme.desc: Military search and rescue efforts in deadly arctic conditions rely on a specialized helicopter with unrivaled power and endurance, and special access reveals how it works; in the Alps, a monster snow blower keeps trains running in dangerous weather.

programme.title: How It's Made: Compression & Extension Springs, Micro Drill Bits, Skiffs, Backsplashes
programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Fencing Masks, Books, Ocean Drone Transformers, and 3D Puzzles
programme.desc: We find out how fencing masks, ocean drone transformers, and 3D puzzles are made.

programme.title: Built by Hand: Pirate Swords of Death
programme.desc: Cutlass swords were the deadly weapons wielded by the pirates of the Caribbean, and today, skilled craftsmen use time-tested methods and modern-day know-how to build these innovative and world-changing weapons by hand.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of Nuclear Secrets
programme.desc: Long, dome-like structures camouflaged by a rural landscape conceal the remains of concrete vaults with a hidden history. Experts investigate and uncover state-of-the-art bunkers built to conceal and protect a deadly nuclear secret.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Japan's Atlantis
programme.desc: Josh heads to Japan to explore the sunken ruins called Japan's Atlantis.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Holiday Hangover
programme.desc: Jonah is the first Johnston to turn 21, and it's Christmas time in the household. While Trent and Amber try to make the holiday merry, the adult kids living at home is causing tension in the family.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Any Place But Home
programme.desc: Tensions between Trent and Amber and their children Jonah, Anna and Liz continue to grow, pushing the kids to ramp up their efforts to leave the house. Then, things explode when Amber presses Anna for details on her plans to move out.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: A New Year, a New Us?
programme.desc: Despite tension in the family, everyone comes together to celebrate the Lunar New Year. Meanwhile, in an attempt to prove to his parents that he does have the motivation to succeed in life, Jonah starts a sports podcast.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: My Farty Valentine
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day, and Trent has a special present in mind for Amber but needs the kids to chip in. Emma and Alex set up a dating profile for Anna, and Trent and Amber take some time to press Liz and Brice on their relationship.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Bromance
programme.desc: Zach contemplates his future on the farm as pumpkin season comes to a close, and the parental roller coaster continues as he and Tori deal with Lilah's eye issue. Amy and Chris host soup night and share some big news, and Caryn also has big news to share.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Oh Baby
programme.desc: Karen and Deon endure a range of emotions over the new baby on the way, but unexpected news from South Carolina rocks Karen's world. Meanwhile, GG still has strong feelings about her growing family, and Darian acts on her suspicions to find out the truth.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: A WHAT in the Oven?
programme.desc: GG learns about Diez's likely condition, triggering a devastating reaction. Dallas and Denver get busted for 'twinning.' Deon suspects Karen might be pregnant, but his excitement is quickly thwarted by an unexpected killjoy.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: My Farty Valentine
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day, and Trent has a special present in mind for Amber but needs the kids to chip in. Emma and Alex set up a dating profile for Anna, and Trent and Amber take some time to press Liz and Brice on their relationship.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Bromance
programme.desc: Zach contemplates his future on the farm as pumpkin season comes to a close, and the parental roller coaster continues as he and Tori deal with Lilah's eye issue. Amy and Chris host soup night and share some big news, and Caryn also has big news to share.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Oh Baby
programme.desc: Karen and Deon endure a range of emotions over the new baby on the way, but unexpected news from South Carolina rocks Karen's world. Meanwhile, GG still has strong feelings about her growing family, and Darian acts on her suspicions to find out the truth.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: A WHAT in the Oven?
programme.desc: GG learns about Diez's likely condition, triggering a devastating reaction. Dallas and Denver get busted for 'twinning.' Deon suspects Karen might be pregnant, but his excitement is quickly thwarted by an unexpected killjoy.

programme.title: Unexpected: 38-Year-Old Grandmother
programme.desc: Lawrence asks Lilly's parents for permission to marry her. Myrka and Ethan video chat with their parents to show off their new baby. Tyra admits that Alex is cheating. Aden is late for Jenna's final doctor's appointment.

programme.title: Unexpected: The Foley Bulb
programme.desc: Lilly and Lawrence take a vacation before the baby comes. The Ybarras head to the hospital to pick up Myrka, Ethan and their new grandbaby. Tyra hopes that moving back in with Alex and Layla will mend their relationship troubles. Jenna gets induced.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Meet the Slaton Sisters
programme.desc: The Slaton's are larger-than-life sisters who have always relied on each other and food for support. Amy, age 31, is desperate to have children, but hasn't been able to due to her weight. While Tammy, age 32, is one step away from being bedridden.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: 1,000 Pounds to Freedom
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy go to Atlanta to meet Dr. Procter to discuss weight loss surgery. When they arrive, Dr. Procter gives Tammy a hefty weight loss goal before he will approve her for surgery, meanwhile the Dietician has more bad news for Amy.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy eagerly begin their weight loss journey. Sticking to their diets is a matter of life or death but proves to be a real struggle. The pressure to reach their goals culminates in a huge fight that threatens their diets and relationship.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A House Divided
programme.desc: After a stressful first month of dieting, the sisters head back to Atlanta for their one-month check in with Dr. Procter to find out if they are on the right path to their weight goals. The results force Amy to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wedding and Weigh-ins
programme.desc: Amy decides to have a real wedding ceremony because if she gets approved for surgery, she's afraid she may not survive. After the wedding, the sisters head to Atlanta hoping for a life-changing final weigh-in.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Under the Knife
programme.desc: Amy undergoes gastric bypass surgery to change her life, but endangers herself by not sticking to the post-op diet. Tammy seeks support from her love interest, Jerry. Two months later, the sisters reveal the changes they've made to family and friends.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Life-Altering News
programme.desc: While Amy reaps the benefits of weight-loss surgery, her sister Tammy worries that she gained weight during quarantine. A visit to urgent care gives Amy life-changing news. Tammy's family confronts her over her health.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Tippin' the Scales
programme.desc: The Slatons head back to Atlanta to see Dr. Procter. Amy is worried about dropping the news that she got pregnant so soon after surgery, against doctor's orders. Tammy returns knowing she's gained all the weight back.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Identical Twin Obsession/ Eats Mattresses
programme.desc: Forty-four year old twins Amy and Becky are addicted to being identical, looking alike, acting alike, and even weighing their meals to stay the exact same size. Meanwhile, Jennifer has been addicted to eating mattresses for over 20 years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Addicted to a Doll/ Eats Plastic Bags
programme.desc: Addicts include a 23-year-old man who's addicted to eating plastic newspaper bags and a 48-year-old woman whose best friend is a doll.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Addicted to Coffee Enemas/ Licks Cats
programme.desc: Trina and her husband, Mike, have done nearly 7,000 coffee enemas over the last two and a half years. Meanwhile, Lisa has been addicted to licking her cat and eating clumps of its hair for three years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Addicted to Psychics/ Addicted to Body Casting
programme.desc: Kevin constantly covers his body in plaster casts. Melissa is incapable of making decision without consulting a psychic.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Extreme Hair/ Addicted to Bee Stings
programme.desc: Asha hasn't cut her 21-foot long hair in nearly a quarter century and spends up to six hours a day grooming her 10-pound locks. Meanwhile, 53-year-old Margaret has stung herself over 50,000 times with bees.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Cat Food/ Smells Mothballs
programme.desc: Mary consumes over 900 cat treats and several cans of wet food every day. Alicia has been addicted to smelling mothballs for 15 years.

programme.desc: With her due date rapidly approaching and her baby breached, Kim learns that her house construction is delayed even further.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Significant Others and Significant Brothers

programme.desc: The girls start to make peace with Rob's new relationship, but feelings get hurt when Rob starts making jokes on social media. Meanwhile Kris and Kim reach their breaking points as housemates and Kendall struggles with feeling left out.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Hawaii Farm'O
programme.desc: Molly Yeh hosts a tiki party game night with all her favourite Hawaiian-inspired foods. She prepares delicious Hurricane Popcorn Balls, Sweet and Salty Pork Musubi, a mouth-watering Macaroni Salad and creamy Macadamia Nut Pops for dessert.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Taco Night Twist
programme.desc: Molly Yeh treats her girlfriends to a taco night done Pizza Friday style. Her menu includes taco pizza Al Pastor with tomatillo salsa and avocado cucumber salad served alongside watermelon agua fresca.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Girl Meets Grill
programme.desc: Molly Yeh fires up the outdoor grill to make her favorite tailgating recipes with a twist, starting with Spicy Cheddar Juicy Lucies with Homemade Chili Potato Chips and Sesame Avocado Salsa on the side.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Nick's Special Birthday TV Dinner
programme.desc: Molly Yeh puts together a TV dinner-themed evening to celebrate Nick's birthday. She's making succulent bacon wrapped meatloaves, mashed cheesy potatoes with pan gravy, spicy easy peasies and a stunning Battenberg cake for the birthday boy.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 10 Things I Love About Ladd
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is spilling the beans on 10 things she loves about her husband, Ladd, and the food he loves most. There's spatchcock BBQ chicken with apple brown sugar BBQ sauce, and he can't resist thin and crispy waffle fries with sour cream and onion dip.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Girls' Night In
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is hosting a girls' night at the lodge, complete with a tasty spread of canapes and cocktails. She makes citrus shrimp nachos and zucchini quinoa cakes with herbed yogurt.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Painting Class
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is preparing for a night of canapes, cocktails and canvasses with a fun painting class at The Merc. She has the fine art of finger food covered with mini Hawaiian chicken skewers, and little zucchini caprese sliders.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Faster Pasta
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making pasta dishes in no time at all. She whips up steakhouse pasta with grilled steak, and her lemon pasta pronto is scattered with glorious flecks of pink and green.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: No Cooking Required
programme.desc: Ree Drummond features some fuss-free recipes that require no cooking. Dishes include her Ranch Muffuletta Sandwich with Spicy Olive Spread and a Chinese Chicken Salad that features rotisserie chicken and ginger.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Take-Along
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shares delicious eats to take along to parties, get-togethers and cookouts, starting with a grilled potato salad and pinwheels three ways. Then she whips up everyone's favorite queso with grilled veggies and quick and easy fruit tarts.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Salute to Firefighters
programme.desc: Four firefighters are heating up the market with a chance to smoke the competition and win up to $20,000. First, the chefs must make a big dinner, but with a 'small' catch. Next, the red lights are flashing as Guy asks the chefs to make a healthy lunch.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: It's a Fieri Father's Day!
programme.desc: Four fathers are out to prove they're the world's greatest dad in the kitchen, and Guy's son, Hunter, is out to prove he's the best co-host on Triple G!. The chefs are forced to use the express lane when making a family dinner.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Puppy Posse

programme.desc: Siblings struggling to sell their sister's home need Lyndsay and Leslie's expertise. The twins redefine the dated two-bedroom rambler into a modern three-bedroom farmhouse with a deck that will be enjoyed even on a rainy Pacific Northwestern day.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Sibling Split Level
programme.desc: Contractor Jeff's sister and brother-in-law want to move into their forever home, but they need to get their split level off the market. With a generous sibling discount and some creativity, Leslie and Lyndsay turn the home into a French country cottage.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: On the Throne
programme.desc: Billy won a million dollars on a scratch-off and changed his family's life, no longer living paycheck to paycheck. Now, they need help to find a forever home in Knoxville, TN, that fits their $180,000 budget.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Spacious Win
programme.desc: A single mom won $3 million on the lottery and wants more space after sharing an apartment with her three growing girls. With four ladies to please, David Bromstad has his hands full finding a home with rooms for everyone and space to spread out.

programme.desc: A single mom won $3 million on the lottery and wants more space after sharing an apartment with her three growing girls. With four ladies to please, David Bromstad has his hands full finding a home with rooms for everyone and space to spread out.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Finding the Perfect Lake House
programme.desc: A New York couple who won a million dollars on a single $5 scratcher can finally buy the second home on Oneida Lake that they've always dreamed of. David helps them find the perfect lakeside dream home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Beach House Perfection
programme.desc: After accidentally picking up a Megaplier instead of his usual weekly lottery ticket, Andy won a whopping $5 million. He's asked David to help him find the perfect beach house for his family to enjoy in North Carolina.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Old Florida Charm
programme.desc: When a New York couple won $7 million on the lottery, they said goodbye to hard work in the Big Apple and hello to sunny retirement in Vero Beach, Florida.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Gone With the Win
programme.desc: A woman that won the lottery with 19 of her co-workers has been dreaming of a new life and home with her fiance. Now, they're ready to look for a grand Tennessean mansion.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Florida Estate Agent Searches for a Dream Home With a View
programme.desc: David helps an estate agent find a waterfront dream home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: New Love, New Home

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Texas Dream Home
programme.desc: Lucky Texas family wins $8 million and everyone gets a dream home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Family Affair
programme.desc: A husband and wife win a whopping $7 million on a New York Cash for Life Lottery and decide they want to live closest to their eldest son in Buffalo, New York.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Winner Winner Chicken Dinner

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Reno Rescue

programme.desc: Jenn helps a couple of recent empty nesters who have enjoyed their home for 20 years give its dark interior a complete update. Next, a frequently moving family asks Jenn to turn their latest home into the place where they'll want to stay for a long time.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Blended Styles

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Ultimate Sin
programme.desc: After leaving a support group, a young mother is gunned down by a masked shooter. As investigators try to make sense of the case, they reveal a story of religious manipulation that leads to one person committing the ultimate sin.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets on the Emerald Coast
programme.desc: Marie Carlson was radiant but behind the glow she hid a darkness. For a while, Marie drifted but, then, a pastor and his wife welcomed her into their lives. It was a spiritual awakening which made Marie's disappearance all the more mysterious.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: At Close Range
programme.desc: Keith Reed was a highly-regarded school superintendent. When he didn't show up at an out-of-town conference, it set off alarm bells. Investigators took a hard look at his love life for clues and made a startling discovery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Sister's Search
programme.desc: Aasha Davis moved to Hollywood with big dreams. Her sister Lesley followed for support. Then, Lesley went missing and Aasha was desperate to find her. In a town built on deception, police came up with a high-stakes plan to smoke out their suspect.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Killing in Cobb County
programme.desc: It is a story of obsession that boiled over into a brutal crime. Right away, one woman said she knew what happened. Yet, it took years to bring the alleged killer to trial and the verdict was far from the end of this case.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deep in the Woods
programme.desc: Kelli Bordeaux was just starting what she hoped to be a long career in the military, but fate had other plans. When she vanished, friends and family launched a frantic search, but it was stranger hell-bent on justice who uncovered the ugly truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in Pleasant Grove
programme.desc: The doctor and the model made a stunning couple. Together they built a loving family. Her death was sudden but ruled natural causes. Secrets remained hidden for years. Then, her daughters became amateur detectives to help unlock the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Deceit
programme.desc: A family mourned the loss of a young mother in a house fire. Authorities ruled it an accident. Then, years later, there was another accident and second loved one was gone.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Toxic
programme.desc: Kevin and Morgan Mengel were happy at first, but when the marriage went bad, he went missing. Police wondered if he simply left, but a family's relentless pursuit lead to a stunning confrontation and, eventually, the truth.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Death Among Him
programme.desc: Kelly & Tonya take on an investigation so big that it spans two episodes. They head to Wyoming to work with Carbon County Law Enforcement to look into the mysterious deaths of two women years apart, but connected by the same circle of friends.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Death Among Him
programme.desc: In part two of their investigation, the Cold Justice team continues to investigate three mysterious deaths in Wyoming. The team hopes to finally be able to give answers to all the families involved.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Danger at Dawn
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey Abbondandolo investigate the cold-blooded murder of a fun-loving Texas country boy shot in the back of his head.

programme.title: Cold Justice: No Safe Return
programme.desc: Kelly and Aaron Sam look into the disappearance of a father who tragically vanished just before he could move back home to his family. A surprising twist comes from a forensic lab.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: The fire broke out before dawn. After the smoke cleared, a mother of two young children was found dead. It was the tragic end to a life that held so much promise, but for investigators, it was just the beginning.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Inside the Hunt for El Chapo
programme.desc: For over a decade, El Chapo evaded authorities but one man was determined to catch the infamous kingpin. Former DEA agent Andrew Hogan comes out of the shadows to detail his search and capture with never-before-seen videos and photographs.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Killer Caller
programme.desc: Twin Cities, MN, police are hunting for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness. No one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Deadly Summer
programme.desc: In the summer of 1976, the NYPD are chasing a man shooting at couples in parked cars with a gigantic, .44 caliber handgun. He taunts the city with terrifying letters until police get a lead about a suspect who has shot a neighbor's dog.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Deadly Design
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores. Police release surveillance footage to the press and ask the public for help to find a duffle bag wielding murderer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The I-40 Killer
programme.desc: A killer is murdering and mutilating young women along the Route 40 corridor in Delaware. But when investigators set up an undercover operation, the hunter soon becomes the hunted.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The I-95 Killer
programme.desc: After multiple men are discovered brutally murdered, investigators determine that each victim was last seen with a handsome stranger they met in a bar. Police ask the public for help in tracking down a dangerous drifter before he kills again.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Charmer
programme.desc: A series of women in the Seattle area are found brutally murdered, their bodies posed. Police realize they may have a killer stalking the area nightclub scene, one who is able to charm his victims into submission.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Englewood Killer
programme.desc: Chicago police are investigating the murders of several women, whose bodies are discovered in abandoned buildings barefoot. Evidence indicates there is one offender, now police need to locate him.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Classified to Kill
programme.desc: Chicago detectives believe a serial killer is using the classified ads to lure and murder his victims. The investigation is set ablaze when flames obliterate evidence, until police make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Snapped: The Case Continues: The Death of Selena
programme.desc: We revisit the case and trial of Yolanda Saldivar, who was convicted of murdering pop star sensation Selena in 1995. A new claim from Yolanda hit the spotlight in March of 2019, which could have a major effect on her sentencing.

programme.title: Movie: Straight Outta Compton
programme.desc: The backstory of N.W.A. and its members, who came together and began putting to music their harsh experiences and anger about life growing up in the most dangerous place in America.

programme.desc: Drs. Ben and Erin Schroeder chase a pig through the mud and save a wild bald eagle.

programme.title: Heartland Docs, DVM: The Cat's Meow
programme.desc: The Schroeder’s squeeze in some family time as they set sail on their new boat.

programme.title: Heartland Docs, DVM: Heartland Shellebration
programme.desc: The vets treat a cat’s injured tail, a turtle’s busted shell, and a cow with a fifth leg.

programme.title: Heartland Docs, DVM: What’s All the Pus About?
programme.desc: The Schroeder’s dog Happy stops breathing during surgery.

programme.title: Heartland Docs, DVM: Poultry in Motion
programme.desc: Drs. Ben and Erin Schroeder care for animals in need in rural Nebraska.

programme.title: Heartland Docs, DVM: Dinner and a Moo-vie
programme.desc: Drs. Ben and Erin Schroeder care for animals in need in rural Nebraska.

programme.title: Heartland Docs, DVM: The Little Practice on the Prairie
programme.desc: The Schroeder’s help farmers and animals deal with the aftermath of record flooding.

programme.title: Heartland Docs, DVM: Doggie Delivery
programme.desc: Early spring in Nebraska brings new life and unpredictable veterinary challenges.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Search for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Mysterious evidence on Mt. Ararat could be the long-lost remains of Noah's Ark, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate if these discoveries are hard proof of the Biblical legend.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Hindenburg
programme.desc: When the Nazi airship Hindenburg exploded in a giant ball of fire, the world's largest aircraft in history became one of its greatest catastrophes, and now, new technology might finally reveal what caused the fatal crash and if it was an act of sabotage.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Worlds: Secrets of the Sumerian
programme.desc: The sacred city of Nippur and the world's only ziggurat contain elusive mysteries to the ancient Sumerian people. Now, archaeologists armed with pioneering tech are on a quest to reveal the secrets behind the earliest known civilization in history.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Holy Grail
programme.desc: Europe's vast collection of priceless art and treasures were shamelessly plundered by the Nazis during World War II. Now, experts examine Hitler's ultimate quest for ancient relics and the Holy Grail, and the mythical power he sought in its possession.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Experts investigate the fate of billions of dollars in gold and artwork that Hitler stole during World War II, and using brand-new discoveries, they might finally locate the whereabouts of the missing Nazi treasure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Sumerian Pyramid of Death
programme.desc: Deep in the Iraqi desert, the world's only ziggurat towers over the remains of the first civilization ever known in human history; armed with pioneering satellite imagery, experts investigate the dark mysteries behind this massive, ancient structure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Holy Grail
programme.desc: Europe's vast collection of priceless art and treasures were shamelessly plundered by the Nazis during World War II. Now, experts examine Hitler's ultimate quest for ancient relics and the Holy Grail, and the mythical power he sought in its possession.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Holy Grail
programme.desc: Europe's vast collection of priceless art and treasures were shamelessly plundered by the Nazis during World War II. Now, experts examine Hitler's ultimate quest for ancient relics and the Holy Grail, and the mythical power he sought in its possession.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Sumerian Gods
programme.desc: The ancient Sumerian city of Nippur is one of the richest archaeological sites on Earth, but decades of conflict have prevented its exploration. Now, experts gain rare access to finally uncover the mysteries behind the most sacred city of Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Super Weird
programme.desc: Revealing how to bend fire, turn a vacuum cleaner into a didgeridoo, and become the world's fastest talker.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Controlled Chaos
programme.desc: Witness the most shocking stunts and reckless displays of insanity the web has to offer.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: Rounding up the strangest clips lurking in the shadows, embracing all things weird and wonderful, and revealing the crazy science behind snoring humming birds, bands performing underwater and alligators frozen alive in ice.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Quantum Leaps
programme.desc: We're glimpsing into the internet's biggest breakthroughs, genius inventions and awesome builds that are undeniable quantum leaps. We'll see robot exoskeletons, swords made with thermite and high speed scooters.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: This Changes Everything
programme.desc: Witness the most shocking stunts and reckless displays of insanity the web has to offer.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Toughest Tunnels
programme.desc: A team of engineers work to transform a centuries-old underground network into a modern-day world-class sewer system, overhauling London's underground infrastructure using cutting-edge tech and the latest construction methods.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Navy's Aircraft Carrier
programme.desc: The US Navy's Ford-class aircraft carrier is the world's largest warship, and using the latest naval and aeronautic technology, engineers and military personnel race to build and test this cutting-edge vessel.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: NYC Mega Tower
programme.desc: The skinniest skyscraper in the world will soon become New York's third tallest, and using an innovative, gravity-defying design, this colossal megastructure is breaking all the rules of engineering.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Underwater Mega Tower
programme.desc: One of the most cutting-edge buildings in the world is a 16-story hotel built on the cliffs of an abandoned quarry, and using the latest science and tech, engineers race to build this innovative mega-structure with two underwater floors.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Tallest Roller Coaster
programme.desc: Kingda Ka is the tallest roller coaster in the world and fastest in the U.S., redefining the design of all thrill rides. This engineering colossus is one of the most innovative on the planet and features the fastest drop ride ever built.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: World's Biggest Ship
programme.desc: Find out what it took to build the largest ship in the world, the Pioneering Spirit. This 900,000-ton behemoth can install oil pipelines in the world's deepest waters and features state-of-the art thrusters and mammoth lifting beams.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Monster Oil Rig
programme.desc: The Perdido Oil Platform is one of the most advanced feats in modern engineering, producing 100,000 barrels of oil each day. This mammoth structure is as tall as the Eiffel tower and manages to stay afloat in some of the deepest waters in the world.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Body Cam: Knife's Edge
programme.desc: In Ohio a man shoots his ex. She flees and violence erupts when an officer finds him. In Utah police are called to a house where a mother and children have escaped a suspect armed with a machete. In California a therapist is attacked by a former patient.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.

programme.title: Body Cam: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Arkansas officers are pinned down by a deadly gunman for four hours. Then, in Oklahoma City, officers fear an ambush when a suspect bails from a stolen pick-up truck.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Is Rodney Reed Innocent?
programme.desc: A Texas woman is brutally raped and murdered, and the trial sparks a racially charged debate over whether an innocent man has been condemned to death. But as new evidence comes to light, it seems her family may never know who killed Stacey Stites.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: He Didn't Have to Die
programme.desc: Eric Cates is found burned to death in his pickup truck. Police suggest suicide, but Eric's mother is convinced of foul play. Later, a motorist pursues Zach Lamb in a car chase and kills him in a violent confrontation.

programme.title: Body Cam: Life in Ruins
programme.desc: In Ohio, SWAT tears down a house to arrest two brothers wanted for murder. In Washington, a high-speed pursuit ends when a crash entangles an officer's car in live electrical cables. In Texas, a DWI driver hits a goods train carrying explosive chemicals.

programme.title: Body Cam: My Name is Death
programme.desc: Officers confront a knife-wielding suspect. In Florida, a man who flees into the woods is outsmarted by a K9 Officer. In Indiana, a gunman wages war on police, caught on surveillance cameras, until SWAT closes in.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: He Didn't Have to Die
programme.desc: Eric Cates is found burned to death in his pickup truck. Police suggest suicide, but Eric's mother is convinced of foul play. Later, a motorist pursues Zach Lamb in a car chase and kills him in a violent confrontation.

programme.title: Body Cam: Life in Ruins
programme.desc: In Ohio, SWAT tears down a house to arrest two brothers wanted for murder. In Washington, a high-speed pursuit ends when a crash entangles an officer's car in live electrical cables. In Texas, a DWI driver hits a goods train carrying explosive chemicals.

programme.title: Body Cam: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Arkansas officers are pinned down by a deadly gunman for four hours. Then, in Oklahoma City, officers fear an ambush when a suspect bails from a stolen pick-up truck.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Suburban Secrets
programme.desc: When doting mother, Cheryl Coker, vanishes from Riverside, Ohio on October 2nd 2018 numerous search efforts come up empty. But as police take a closer look at the case, they uncover some disturbing information.

programme.title: Evil In-Law: Love, Greed and Murder
programme.desc: Patricia Siler thinks she's married into a family of wealth and status when she weds Tom Allanson. But when Tom is disinherited, Pat's dreams are dashed and two generations of in-laws find themselves victim of her deadly wrath.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Crime Scene Selfie
programme.desc: 23-year-old Amanda Taylor shares her entire life on the internet. Following a terrible tragedy, her posts begin take a dark turn.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Playing Doctor
programme.desc: 24-year-old Jessika Rovell falls for Jeffrey Marsalis' charm and good looks but when she discovers his secret online life as Dr. Jeff, she realizes she's been dating a monster who stalks dating websites.

programme.title: Guilty Rich: Silicon Valley Secrets
programme.desc: A mild-mannered Google X exec with a taste for the latest high-tech gadgets pays the ultimate price for his new purchase. The dark truth behind Silicon Valley's glittering success is exposed when police discover he was hiding more than industry secrets.

programme.title: Behind Mansion Walls: Daddy Dearest
programme.desc: For these children, Daddy's millions bought them everything they could ever want, but the man that was meant to be their greatest protector was about to become their mortal enemy.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: No Secret Is Safe
programme.desc: An early morning home invasion and double-murder appears to be drug-related, but when investigators speak to the lone survivor of the attack they discover a more sinister motive.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: A Family to Fear
programme.desc: 59-yr-old Susan Greene and 62-yr-old Dennis Goins get a new lease on love later in life. After they tie the knot, the couple must face each other's dark side, and worse, family members. Then a gruesome weekend-long crime spree tears the family apart.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Blood Money
programme.desc: After two-long lost brothers connect as young adults, a dark disturbance emerges within the newly blended family unit.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened in Apartment 1601?
programme.desc: Three friends, all with big futures ahead of them, headed to a studio apartment near Washington, D.C., after a night of barhopping. Sometime afterwards, one of them was butchered with a knife; the two survivors told police they don't know what happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Jordie
programme.desc: On April 10th 2016, Jordie Hudson vanishes after a night out with friends. The only clue police have is her glasses, which are discovered in a pool of blood. Surveillance footage shows a horrific attack.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Air McNair
programme.desc: Retired NFL superstar Steve McNair is found shot to death along with his young mistress. Pat Postigilone reveals the true story of his investigation and its shocking conclusion, which has become the most talked about murder mystery in Nashville history.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: The Body in the Rug
programme.desc: Detectives discover that murder may be a family affair, when they discover a body wrapped up in a rug and stashed in the corner of an apartment.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Overkill
programme.desc: A young woman finds her beloved neighbour, Rebecca Claybrook, beaten to death in her own home. The men in Claybrook's life are put under the microscope by Detective Fil Waters.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: 9/11: As We Watched
programme.desc: The story of that day through the unflinching eye of ABC News, as the network's anchors and reporters rushed to the scenes of chaos and embarked on what would become an extraordinary 83 hours of live coverage.

programme.title: Jonestown Massacre: As We Watched
programme.desc: This hour goes inside the People's Temple to see how Jim Jones lured 1000 Americans to Guyana and forced them to die in the largest mass murder-suicide in U.S. history prior to 9/11.

programme.title: Chernobyl Disaster: As We Watched
programme.desc: The catastrophic Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant in the Ukraine created the worst atomic energy accident in world history, endangering the lives of millions of people.

programme.title: Iran Hostage Crisis: As We Watched
programme.desc: In this riveting hour we relive the high stakes drama of the Iran hostage crisis, from the terrifying moment when the American embassy is seized on November 4th, 1979, to the last minute negotiations that freed the hostages 444 days later.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vail Log Cabin
programme.desc: The Walker family rebuilds their 100 year old mining cabin in the Colorado wilderness. Fortunately, they're a family of engineers who are game for any challenges. The tools used for this project will be as old as the cabin itself!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: An adventurous couple builds a home with self-sustaining features near the Ozark National Forest. While they both have renovation experience, building on the dangerous mountainside terrain in a location plagued by flash foods will be a challenge.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: White Mountain
programme.desc: With help from a team of friends, an avid outdoorsman takes on the challenge of building a cabin in the remote White Mountains region of Alaska. The crew must work through snow, wind and mud to haul materials and build the cabin in just seven days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: A couple plans to build an oceanfront oasis for their family on the slopes of Maui, Hawaii. To keep the budget low, they design a Quonset hut which can be built cheaply and quickly, but unexpected setbacks test their limits at every turn.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Michael Reynolds is an architect and visionary that created the Earthship. Earthships are houses that are completely self-sufficient and totally off the grid with no electricity or water bills - ever.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Man Cave
programme.desc: Joe Donovan, an avid skier and adventurer, has found the perfect spot for his permanent base camp on a remote ridge in southwest Montana. Follow the adventure as he battles the elements to build his rustic, straw bale, dream cabin.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Peanut Silo Salvage
programme.desc: The crew score some doors from the Virginia Military Institute before hesitantly taking on a Peanut Silo Salvage in Virginia. After a precarious roof removal they devise a plan to dismantle the silos while keeping them intact.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Home Tree Home
programme.desc: A treehouse escape grows into a full-time live-in treehouse when Pete lays eyes on the gargantuan Sitka spruce of his dreams for a hexagonal build on the coast of Oregon.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Adventure Headquarters
programme.desc: Pete and the NTS gang embark on an epic quest to give a thrill-seeking couple the treehouse of their dreams. This house will be an adventure headquarters in the sky, sitting 16 feet high with a wraparound deck that provides 360 degrees of stunning views.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Bon-Appé-Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and his brigade de cuisine cook up a dining room treehouse for a French restaurant.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Zac Brown's Space Crab
programme.desc: Country superstar Zac Brown tasks Pete with building an otherworldly treehouse at Camp Southern Ground, a state-of-the-art camp for kids. The team constructs a zinc-wrapped treehouse that's half spaceship, half horseshoe crab, and fully out of this world.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: How 'Bout Them Apples
programme.desc: Pete trucks out to Walden, NY, to build a treehouse tasting room for Angry Orchard. The pavilion-style structure will elevate orchard-goers high above the acres of apple trees where they can enjoy a glass of hard cider and soak in views of the orchard.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Insane Inventions
programme.desc: Roger Mooking says goodbye to the standard grill and celebrates the most elaborate, over-the-top smokers and roasters.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southern Sizzle and Smoke
programme.desc: At a non-profit organization to support veterans in Georgia, Roger Mooking helps cook a whole mutton and slow-roast veggies for a cookout. At Bob Sykes Bar-B-Q in Bessemer, AL, he loads 250 pounds of salted pork into a 15-foot pit.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Burlington, VT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a 3.5-pound breakfast sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.title: Restaurant Recovery: Legacy on the Line
programme.desc: Todd Graves returns to his hometown of Baton Rouge to help Poor Boy Lloyd's, a legendary seafood spot in Louisiana. The owner purchased what is now the longest-running restaurant in downtown with savings from working on oil rigs for 20 years.

programme.title: Restaurant Recovery: Legends Can't Die
programme.desc: Todd Graves is in Chicago to help the father and son owners of Mr. Beef on Orleans, an iconic Italian beef shop that rose to fame in the late '80s. In the immediate aftermath of COVID-19, their sales dropped to a few sandwiches a day.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Slammin' Hot and Smoky
programme.desc: In Asheville, N.C., Michael Symon digs into a slammin' sandwich with three different cuts of pork smothered in triple-cheese sauce.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Ooey, Gooey and Cheesy
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets messy in New Orleans with a bacon-onion jam, brie and brioche burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Deep-Fried Comfort Creations
programme.desc: Michael digs into an incredible one-of-a-kind creation: a deep-fried burger.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Capital City Cuisine
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Washington DC for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Chowin' Down In Portland
programme.desc: Food blogger, Ali Khan, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Portland.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Savory San Antonio
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in San Antonio, Texas, looking for deals on breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Big D Delights
programme.desc: Ali Khan is tracking down the best deals in Dallas for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. He comes in hot with a sweet and savory Monte Cristo donut and then checks out the The Big D's BBQ scene for some succulent burnt ends.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Caribbean Island Hopping
programme.desc: Tony travels to the Grenadine Islands to sample local cuisine and explore the Caribbean lifestyle. He tries scuba diving, fishing and hunting for local delicacies.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Krakow
programme.desc: From peasant food to royal snacks, Andrew reveals what makes the food scene in Krakow, Poland, so delicious. The city's edible symbols take the form of pierogis, hearty stuffed cabbage rolls and whole-roasted pork knuckle.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Florence
programme.desc: Florence, Italy lives up to its artistic reputation even in its food. Andrew Zimmern explores the classics like the rare Florentine steak, thick ribollita soup, the original cappuccino and the world famous frozen dessert, gelato.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bogota
programme.desc: Andrew explores the sky-high flavors of Bogota, Colombia. This mountaintop city keeps warm with hearty potato soup, whole-roasted stuffed pork, egg filled arepas, their unique take on the tamale and cheesy hot chocolate.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris
programme.desc: In the city of love, Andrew Zimmern explores the delicious delicacies of Paris, France; from the indulgent steak frites and the croque monsieur, to the baked croissant and baguette, to the sweet macaroons and savory crepes.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Nutty for Nuts
programme.desc: Today is going to be a little nut! Hazelnuts can sweeten a savory dish, peanuts can bring a bit of saltiness to a dessert, and pistachios can add a crunchy texture.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Veg Out
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares home-cooked meals that are packed with locally grown veggies straight from the plant or prepared in a way that no vegetable has ever dreamed. Get ready to veg out with a full day of eats- without the meat!

programme.title: Food Truck Fan Fight: Sham-rockin' in Denver
programme.desc: Five of Denver's finest food trucks face off in two rounds of competition. First, the chefs hand out samples of their signature dishes at Stanley Marketplace to savvy locals. The top two move on to downtown Denver and the one who sells the most, wins.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Kids' Menu
programme.desc: From macaroni and cheese to milkshakes to pizza, these are the greatest dishes found on- and inspired b- the kids' menu. Alex Guarnaschelli shares her comfort food lunch favourite from Ted's Bulletin in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliantly Baked
programme.desc: It's time to indulge in some of the best baked goods imaginable as Martha Stewart shows off a beautifully perfect brioche she can't get enough of in New York City.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brunchtime BBQ
programme.desc: In Charleston, S.C., Michael Symon smokes a whole hog and makes chorizo from scratch for a saucy BBQ brunch burrito with two different fire-roasted salsas. In Atlanta, an authentic Caribbean roasted pork sandwich has a dedicated local following.

programme.desc: Luz, Willow, and Amity take a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lizard Whisperer/ Robot Rodeo
programme.desc: After being inadvertently zapped by a 'gigantinator' ray, Phineas and Ferb's chameleon grows to the size of a dinosaur. Candace and Stacy are upset because Stacy's mom does not think they are responsible enough to go to a concert on their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Secret of Success/ The Doof Side of the Moon
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb are building an ATV powerful enough to handle extreme terrains and even buildings. Meanwhile, Candace and Stacy go to a leadership retreat where Candace learns the steps needed to achieve her ultimate goal of busting her brothers.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Resolution/ Winter Greens
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, Cricket insists on helping Gloria complete her resolution of approaching her long-time crush, Kevin. Cricket and Remy challenge Vasquez to a snowball fight, while Tilly creates a snowperson.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight
programme.desc: When Cricket gets sick, his family steps in to fulfill his commitments for the day. Chip Whistler shows up at the farmers’ market in an attempt to steal business.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Last Stall on the Left/ Got Stank
programme.desc: Armed with his magic ninja suit, Randy faces his first battle with McFist's monster, Krakenstein.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Gossip Boy/ Tale of the Golden Doctor's Note
programme.desc: Ninja must rescue Howard, captured by McFist, before his secret identity is revealed.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: House of 1,000 Boogers/ Attack of the Killer Potatoes
programme.desc: Randy and Howard crash Bash's big party, only to discover it's a plot to unmask the Ninja.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Monster Dump/ So You Think You Can Stank
programme.desc: Randy must put on his ninja suit to save his classmates after a field trip to the town volcano goes horribly awry.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: 30 Seconds to Math/ Monster Drill
programme.desc: Randy and Howard realize they should have paid more attention in Spanish class.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Dawn of the Driscol/ Night of the Living McFizzles
programme.desc: Randy misuses the NinjaNomicon and accidentally brings the skeleton of a mad scientist back to life. Also, something is turning everyone in town into zombies.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: McFists of Fury/ Viva El Nomicon
programme.desc: When a Mexican Death Bear runs amok at school, Randy and Howard realize they should have paid more attention during Spanish class.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Silent Punch, Deadly Punch/ Ninja Camp
programme.desc: Randy runs out of smoke bombs and tries to make more; Randy must stop a ninja army.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Stank'd to the Future/ Wave Slayers
programme.desc: A frozen student from the 1980s is turned into a crazy monster by the Sorcerer.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Sword Quest/ Nukid on the Block
programme.desc: Franz, a new exchange student, threatens to destroy the Ninja and friendships too.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Weinerman Up/ Evil Spirit Week
programme.desc: When Randy and Howard's video game battle gets out of hand, the Ninja must save the town from a giant robot.

programme.title: Randy Cunningham: 9th Grade Ninja: Der Monster Klub/ Grave Puncher: The Movie
programme.desc: When Randy and Howard are forced to share a lunch table with the outcast group 'Der Monster Klub,' they realize these oddballs are playing a dangerous game that could destroy the whole school.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Spin! Advance! Survive!
programme.desc: Dante takes on a member of the Risen 3 on his first roll in the Blading circuit. Meanwhile, Arman is already ahead of the pack.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Quietest Day Ever/ Bully Bromance Breakup
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create ninja outfits that make themselves invisible to anyone not wearing one.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Doonkleberry Imperative/ Buford Confidential
programme.desc: The boys go out in search of Doonkelberries so that Mom can make her famous pie.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sleepwalk Surprise/ Sci-Fi Pie Fly
programme.desc: Candace's plans to hang out with Jeremy are derailed after he becomes interested in playing a new game. Phineas and Ferbs create their own flying saucer to help solve a mystery.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Woman married to the defendant claims a year after they had a child, the defendant left because he didn’t want to be a husband or a father. They reconciled, but she is suing him for unpaid rent.

programme.title: Judge Jerry

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackée Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Margaret Cho, and Jamie Kennedy.

programme.title: Black-ish: Good Dre Hunting
programme.desc: Bow convinces a begrudging Dre to try therapy, and he learns how to cope with his anger issues. Meanwhile, Johan becomes a life coach to the kids.

programme.title: Black-ish: Churched
programme.desc: In the Johnson home, Sundays involve SAT prep and sports, so when the family is invited to Church on Sunday by the neighbours, Dre goes against his instinct of always saying 'no' and agrees.

programme.title: The Flash: Masquerade
programme.desc: Cecile is forced to confront her past in order to break free from a psychic prison. Meanwhile, Chester takes over for Cisco but makes a mistake that puts Barry in serious danger.

programme.title: Superman & Lois: O Mother, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: Lana reaches out to Lois and Clark while Kyle stars behaving strangely. Jonathan opens up to Jordan, and Sarah storms out after accusing her mom of always covering for her dad.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Library
programme.desc: The library questions Jerry about a book that has been overdue since 1971. George wonders whether a homeless man was his former high school gym teacher.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Kiss Hello
programme.desc: Jerry cannot stand Elaine's friend, who always wants to kiss him hello.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Young People Have Phlegm Too
programme.desc: A sexy young girl who Charlie has been dating cajoles him into going to a hot new club and bringing Alan along to meet her friend. When they arrive, Charlie and Alan are mortified to learn that the partygoers consider them 'old.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: No Sniffing, No Wowing
programme.desc: Alan takes Charlie to meet with his divorce attorney, Laura, after Judith expresses concern that Charlie is a bad influence on Jake. Laura is open to Charlie's other relationships, but takes advantage of her request that he be available at any time.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Girl Talk
programme.desc: When The Ottoman Empire's business declines due to a new furniture competitor, Adam offers to make Murray a commercial starring Marvin, but things go awry when Marvin's actions mess up the original plan.

programme.title: Mom: Martinis and a Sponge Bath
programme.desc: When Christy and Adam get into a car accident, Bonnie is hurt to discover she is neither of their emergency contacts.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: It's Halloween and the Baxter family is excited for their annual party, except for Mike who's reluctantly tasked with choosing the theme.

programme.title: Mom: Fun Girl Stuff and Eternal Salvation

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Hanes vs. Manning

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Miles vs. Turner

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Heather is suing Jimmy over a personal loan that was needed for rent and bills; Jimmy says his financial advisor stole the money. Then, Argad says Hassan owes him for unpaid parking tickets and tolls incurred when he rented his car to him.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her ex-fiancé because she claims after he called off their engagement, he took back her engagement ring. Her ex claims his former fiancé was seeing another man on the side, so that’s why he called off the engagement.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
